description: List of properties of the configuration template.

allOf.$comment: Only atomic property types are supported; `Configuration` is forbidden.
Configuration field values are atomic literals or secret references, never FEEL expressions.

binding.description: Specifying how the property is mapped to the configuration value. Only the `property` binding is supported.

type.description: The type of a property binding. Always "property" for configuration templates.

name.description: The key of the property in the configuration's value object.

secret.description: Marks the property as a field that typically holds a secret reference. Used by the configuration editor as a rendering hint (e.g. obfuscated input or secret picker); not enforced.
